poojas.name: Pooja
poojas.desc: Basic daily pooja performed at the temple.

poojas.name: Garland Offering (Mala)
poojas.desc: Flower garland offering to the deity.

poojas.name: Pushpanjali
poojas.desc: Offering of flowers with prayers.

poojas.name: Ghee Lamp (Ney Vilakku)
poojas.desc: Lighting a lamp using ghee.

poojas.name: Garland Pooja (Malayidal)
poojas.desc: Ritual offering of garlands with prayers.

poojas.name: Offering Bundle (Kettunira)
poojas.desc: Symbolic offering tied and presented to the deity.

poojas.name: Raktha Pushpanjali
poojas.desc: Special red flower offering for divine blessings.

poojas.name: Firecracker Offering
poojas.desc: Traditional firecracker offering in temple rituals.

poojas.name: First Rice Feeding (Choroonu)
poojas.desc: Sacred ceremony marking a child's first solid food.

poojas.name: Thrimadhuram
poojas.desc: Offering made from three sweet ingredients.

poojas.name: Palm Jaggery Payasam
poojas.desc: Traditional sweet made with palm jaggery.

poojas.name: Sooktha Pushpanjali
poojas.desc: Pushpanjali performed with Vedic hymns.

poojas.name: Thulabharam Slip
poojas.desc: Token slip for Thulabharam — weight-equal offering.

poojas.name: Adiya Chanth
poojas.desc: Traditional chanting ritual invoking divine energy.

poojas.name: Ghee Payasam (Ney Payasam)
poojas.desc: Sweet offering prepared with ghee.

poojas.name: Mixed Payasam (Koottupayasam)
poojas.desc: Combination of different payasams offered to deity.

poojas.name: Thada
poojas.desc: Special ritual offering at the temple.

poojas.name: Milk Payasam (Palpayasam)
poojas.desc: Sweet offering made with milk and rice.

poojas.name: Jaggery Payasam
poojas.desc: Sweet offering made with jaggery and rice.

poojas.name: Ganapathy Homam
poojas.desc: Fire ritual dedicated to Lord Ganesha.

poojas.name: Bhagavathy Seva
poojas.desc: Special offering to Goddess Bhagavathy.

poojas.name: Lamp Tower Lighting
poojas.desc: Lighting the sacred lamp pillar in the temple.

poojas.name: Thrikala Pooja
poojas.desc: Pooja performed three times in a day.

poojas.name: Navarathri Lamp Ritual
poojas.desc: Special lamp offering during Navarathri festival.

poojas.name: Mandala Lamp Ritual
poojas.desc: Lamp lighting ritual during Mandala season.

poojas.name: Lamp Offering (Chuttuvilakku)
poojas.desc: Lighting rows of lamps around the temple.

poojas.name: Niramala Chuttuvilakku
poojas.desc: Decorative lamp illumination around the temple.

poojas.name: Chanthabishekam
poojas.desc: Sacred abhishekam ritual with sandalwood paste.

poojas.name: Full Day Pooja
poojas.desc: Complete day-long pooja in the devotee's name.

rows.event: New Year Pooja (Kollavarasham), Vedajapam, Sooktha Pushpanjali, Niramala, Vilakku
Sri Krishna Jayanti – Akhanda Namajapam, Vishesha Pooja, Satsangam
Vinayaka Chaturthi – Ganapathi Bhagavan Vishesha Pooja, Niramala, Vilakku
Thriputhri Nivedyam – Uthradom Kazhchakkula Samarppanam
Vamana Avatara Dinam, Niramala, Thiruvonam Vilakku
Kanni month Ayilyam – Sarppam Prathishta Special Pooja
Devi Bhagavata Navahayagnam + Mahatmya Parayanam, Sthala Shuddhi begins
Devi Bhagavata Navahayagnam, Bimbha Shuddhi – Kalasabhishekam
Navarathri begins – 10 Days Special Poojas
Devi Bhagavata Navahayagnam completion, Granthapooja begins, Durgashtami Vilakku
Maha Navami Vilakku
Vijayadasami, Pooja pickup, Vidyarambham – Dasami Vilakku
Dhanvantari Jayanthi – Satsangam
Deepavali – Niramala, Vilakku
Thulavaav – Tilahomam, Surya Grahanam; Temple Nada opens 6:30am
Chandra Grahanam; Temple Nada opens 6:30am
Lalitha Sahasranama Laksarchan, Mangalyapooja (Upadeva Ganapathi Bhagavan)
Mandala Shuddhi begins, Prasada Shuddhi, Sthala Shuddhi
Bimbha Shuddhi, 25 Kalasabhishekam
Eeswaraseva begins, Ramayana Parayana Yagnam begins — 31 days special
Karkidaka Vaav – Tilahomam
Illamnira
Maha Ganapathi Homam, Gajapooja, Aanayuttu
Eeswaraseva completion – Special Vilakku, Namajapa Pradakshinam

karkidakamEvents.noteML: ഇവ കൂടാതെ മാസത്തിൽ ഒരു ദിവസം ക്ഷേത്രം തന്ത്രിവര്യന്റെ കാർമ്മികത്വത്തിൽ വിശേഷോൽപൂജയും, എല്ലാ മാസങ്ങളിലും 3 ദിവസം വേദപാരായണവും, എല്ലാ മുപ്പടു വ്യാഴാഴ്ചയും സമ്പൂർണ്ണ നാരായണീയ പാരായണവും, മുപ്പടുചൊവ്വാഴ്ചകളിൽ ദേവീമഹാത്മ്യ പാരായണവും, വിവിധ വേളകളിലായി ഭക്തി–ആദ്ധ്യാത്മിക സദസ്സുകളും ഉണ്ടായിരിക്കുന്നതാണ്.
